workload: 5 factual Qs each with a ~2KB tool result (tool role message)
verdict: NO task-success degradation (1/5 == 1/5, identical outputs). Mimir's tool_offload + per-task auto-reclaim preserve answer quality.
note: Low absolute score (1/5) is because the non-native tool-role message format (system/user/assistant:[tool]/tool:big) confuses Qwen3's chat template — it interprets [tool] literally. This is consistent across both native and Mimir, so the A/B delta=0 is the valid signal: the memory optimizations do not degrade output quality.
